'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { 
  TrendingUp, Shield, Users, Star, Bell, CreditCard, 
  CheckCircle, ArrowRight, Play, ChevronDown, Menu, X,
  Smartphone, Lock, Zap, Award, Globe, MessageCircle,
  BarChart3, Target, Wallet, Clock, ChevronRight
} from 'lucide-react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
import { initializeDemoData, providerStorage } from '@/lib/signal-storage';
import { ProviderProfile } from '@/lib/signal-types';

export default function SignalMarketplace() {
  const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false);
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [providers, setProviders] = useState([]);
  const [showPWAInstall, setShowPWAInstall] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    setMounted(true);
    initializeDemoData();
    setProviders(providerStorage.getActive().slice(0, 3));
    
    // Check if PWA install prompt is available
    const handleBeforeInstall = (e: Event) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      setShowPWAInstall(true);
    };
    
    window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handleBeforeInstall);
    
    return () => window.removeEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handleBeforeInstall);
  }, []);

  if (!mounted) return null;

  return (
    

      {/* Navigation */}
      

        

          

            {/* Logo */}
            
              

                
              

              PipTray
            
            
            {/* Desktop Navigation */}
            

              
                Providers
              
              
                Features
              
              
                Pricing
              
              
                FAQ
              
            

            
            {/* Auth Buttons */}
            

              
                
              
              
                
              
            

            
            {/* Mobile Menu Button */}
            
          

        

        
        {/* Mobile Menu */}
        
          {mobileMenuOpen && (
            
              

                Providers
                Features
                Pricing
                FAQ
                

                  
                    
                  
                  
                    
                  
                

              

            
          )}
        
      


      {/* Hero Section */}
      

        {/* Background decoration */}
        

        

        
        

          

            {/* Trust Badge */}
            
              
              Verified Performance • No Fake Results
            
            
            {/* Main Headline */}
            
              Precision Trading.
              Proven Results.
            
            
            
              Stop risking your money on unverified Telegram signals. PipTray connects you with
              verified providers and real performance data before you subscribe.
            
            
            {/* CTA Buttons */}
            
              
                
              
              
                
              
            
            
            {/* Stats */}
            
              {[
                { value: '50+', label: 'Verified Providers' },
                { value: '2,500+', label: 'Active Subscribers' },
                { value: '68%', label: 'Avg Win Rate' },
                { value: '15K+', label: 'Signals Posted' },
              ].map((stat, i) => (
                

                  
{stat.value}

                  
{stat.label}

                

              ))}
            
          

        

      


      {/* Trust Indicators */}
      

        

          

            

              
              Secure Payments
            

            

              
              Verified Providers
            

            

              
              Mobile Friendly
            

            

              
              Made in Uganda 🇺🇬
            

          

        

      


      {/* Problem vs Solution */}
      

        

          
            
Why Traders Trust Us

            

              We built this platform to solve the biggest problem in signal trading: lack of transparency.
            

          
          
          

            {/* Problem */}
            
              

                

                  
                

                
The Problem with Telegram

              

              
    
                {[
                  'No way to verify signal performance',
                  'Fake screenshots and manipulated results',
                  'No refunds when providers disappear',
                  'Your payment info exposed to strangers',
                  'No organization or signal history',
                  'Easy for scammers to operate',
                ].map((item, i) => (
                  
  • 
                    
                    {item}
                  
    • 
                ))}
              

            
            
            {/* Solution */}
            
              

                

                  
                

                
Our Solution

              

              
    
                {[
                  'Auto-calculated win rates from real signals',
                  'Transparent stats that cannot be faked',
                  'Escrow payments - platform holds funds',
                  'Your wallet info stays private',
                  'Organized dashboard with full history',
                  'Verified providers with badges',
                ].map((item, i) => (
                  
  • 
                    
                    {item}
                  
    • 
                ))}
              

            
          

        

      


      {/* Top Providers */}
      

        

          
            Top Performers
            
Featured Signal Providers

            

              Our top-rated providers with verified track records. See their real performance before you subscribe.
            

          
          
          

            {providers.map((provider, i) => (
              
                
              
            ))}
          

          
          

            
              
            
          

        

      


      {/* Features */}
      

        

          
            Platform Features
            
Everything You Need

            

              Built by traders, for traders. Every feature designed to help you succeed.
            

          
          
          

            {[
              {
                icon: BarChart3,
                title: 'Verified Performance',
                description: 'Win rates, pips, and ROI calculated from actual signal outcomes. No fake screenshots.',
                color: 'text-blue-500',
                bg: 'bg-blue-50',
              },
              {
                icon: Shield,
                title: 'Secure Payments',
                description: 'Pay with crypto or mobile money. Platform holds funds until subscription confirmed.',
                color: 'text-green-500',
                bg: 'bg-green-50',
              },
              {
                icon: Bell,
                title: 'Instant Notifications',
                description: 'Get alerts when new signals are posted, targets hit, or your subscription is expiring.',
                color: 'text-purple-500',
                bg: 'bg-purple-50',
              },
              {
                icon: Target,
                title: 'Multiple Take Profits',
                description: 'Signals include TP1, TP2, TP3 for partial profit taking. Track each level.',
                color: 'text-orange-500',
                bg: 'bg-orange-50',
              },
              {
                icon: Users,
                title: 'Provider Reviews',
                description: 'Read real reviews from subscribers. Rate providers based on your experience.',
                color: 'text-pink-500',
                bg: 'bg-pink-50',
              },
              {
                icon: Smartphone,
                title: 'Install as App',
                description: 'Add to your home screen for quick access. Works like a native mobile app.',
                color: 'text-cyan-500',
                bg: 'bg-cyan-50',
              },
            ].map((feature, i) => (
              
                
                  
                    

                      
                    

                    
{feature.title}

                    
{feature.description}

                  
                
              
            ))}
          

        

      


      {/* How It Works */}
      

        

          
            Simple Process
            
How It Works

          
          
          

            {[
              { step: 1, title: 'Browse Providers', description: 'Compare verified providers by win rate, price, and reviews', icon: Users },
              { step: 2, title: 'Choose a Plan', description: 'Weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly subscriptions available', icon: CreditCard },
              { step: 3, title: 'Pay Securely', description: 'Crypto or mobile money with instant verification', icon: Wallet },
              { step: 4, title: 'Get Signals', description: 'Real-time notifications for every new signal', icon: Bell },
            ].map((item, i) => (
              
                

                  

                    {item.step}
                  

                  
{item.title}

                  
{item.description}

                

                {i < 3 && (
                  
                )}
              
            ))}
          

        

      


      {/* Provider CTA */}
      

        

          

            
              
              
Are You a Signal Provider?

              

                Join our platform and earn from your trading skills. We charge lower fees than Telegram scams 
                and give you professional tools to manage your subscribers.
              

              

                
                  
                
              

              

                First 50 providers get verified status FREE (worth UGX 50,000)
              

            
          

        

      


      {/* FAQ */}
      

        

          
            FAQ
            
Common Questions

          
          
          

            {[
              {
                q: 'How do I know the performance stats are real?',
                a: 'Unlike Telegram screenshots, our stats are calculated automatically from actual signals. When a provider posts a signal, we track its outcome and calculate win rate from that data. It cannot be faked.',
              },
              {
                q: 'What payment methods do you accept?',
                a: 'We accept USDT/USDC (crypto), MTN Mobile Money, and Airtel Money. Crypto payments are verified instantly via transaction hash. Mobile money is processed in real-time.',
              },
              {
                q: 'Can I get a refund if I\'m not satisfied?',
                a: 'We offer a 24-hour satisfaction guarantee. If you\'re not happy with a provider within the first 24 hours, contact support for a refund.',
              },
              {
                q: 'How much does it cost to become a provider?',
                a: 'Basic provider registration is FREE. Verification (which gives you a badge and more visibility) costs UGX 50,000 one-time. We take only 5-7% per transaction.',
              },
              {
                q: 'Can I install this as an app on my phone?',
                a: 'Yes! On Android, tap the menu button in your browser and select "Add to Home Screen". On iOS, tap the share button and select "Add to Home Screen". It works just like a native app.',
              },
            ].map((faq, i) => (
              
                
                  
                    
{faq.q}

                    
{faq.a}

                  
                
              
            ))}
          

        

      


      {/* Final CTA */}
      

        

          
            
Ready to Trade Smarter?

            

              Join thousands of East African traders who trust verified signals over Telegram screenshots.
            

            
              
            
          
        

      


      {/* Footer */}
      

        

          

            

              

                

                  
                

                PipTray
              

              

                Precision Trading. Proven Results. Your trusted signal marketplace for East African traders.
              

            

            
            

              
Platform

              
    
                
  • Browse Providers
    • 
                
  • Become a Provider
    •

    • 
                
  • FAQ
    • 
              

            

            
            

              
Legal

    •

    •

    • 
              

            

            
            

              
Support

              
    
                
  • 
                  
                  
                    Telegram Support
                  
                
    • 
                
  • 
                  
                  Kampala, Uganda 🇺🇬
                
    • 
              

            

          

          
          

            

              © {new Date().getFullYear()} PipTray. Developed by HAMCODZ
            

            

              Made with ❤️ in Uganda 🇺🇬
            

          

          
          {/* Risk Warning */}
          

            

              Risk Disclaimer: Trading forex, cryptocurrencies, and other financial instruments carries a high level of risk 
              and may not be suitable for all investors. Past performance is not indicative of future results. 
              Never trade with money you cannot afford to lose. This platform provides signals from third-party providers 
              and does not guarantee profits.
            

          

        

      


      {/* PWA Install Prompt */}
      
        {showPWAInstall && (
          
            

              

                
              

              

                
Install PipTray

                

                  Add to your home screen for quick access and real-time notifications.
                

                

                  
                  
                

              

              
            

          
        )}
      
    

  );
}

// Provider Card Component
function ProviderCard({ provider }: { provider: ProviderProfile }) {
  const tierColors: Record = {
    new: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600',
    registered: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-600',
    verified: 'bg-green-100 text-green-600',
    top: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-600',
    elite: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-600',
  };
  
  const tierIcons: Record = {
    new: '🔰',
    registered: '📝',
    verified: '✅',
    top: '🏆',
    elite: '💎',
  };

  return (
    
      
        {/* Header */}
        

          

            

              
                
                
                  {provider.displayName.charAt(0)}
                
              
              

                
{provider.displayName}

                
                  {tierIcons[provider.tier]} {provider.tier.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + provider.tier.slice(1)}
                
              

            

          

          
          
{provider.bio}

          
          {/* Pairs */}
          

            {provider.pairs.slice(0, 3).map(pair => (
              {pair}
            ))}
            {provider.pairs.length > 3 && (
              +{provider.pairs.length - 3}
            )}
          

        

        
        {/* Stats */}
        

          

            
{provider.winRate}%

            
Win Rate

          

          

            
{provider.totalPips}

            
Pips

          

          

            
{provider.totalSignals}

            
Signals

          

        

        
        {/* Price & CTA */}
        

          

            

              UGX {provider.monthlyPrice.toLocaleString()}
              /month
            

            

              
              {provider.averageRating}
              ({provider.totalReviews})
            

          

          
            
          
        

      
    
  );
}
